title: Smoky Flaky Moroccan Mars Bar Crumble
description: A unique and adventurous take on the classic dessert Mars Bar with a smoky twist, perfect for breakfast or snack time.

ingredients.name: Granulated Sweetener of Choice (Stevia or Agave)

instructions: Melt the butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Stir in chocolate chips and cook until smooth, about 2 minutes.
Remove from heat and add dark chocolate mixture into a mixing bowl. Mix in ground almonds and sweetener. Stir until well combined.
Fold in turmeric powder, coriander seeds, paprika, and a pinch of salt gently. Ensure that the ingredients are evenly distributed.
Press the mixture into an 8x8 inch baking dish lined with parchment paper for easy removal.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes or until golden brown around the edges.
Allow to cool slightly before cutting into squares. Serve immediately as a delightful snack.
